name: BARRAGE / 铁幕
short_description: Tired of "Pew-Pew"pistol,Why not try about Bofors 40mm Anti-Aircraft Guns,or Mighty 88mm Flak-cannon?Shatter the sky with your BARRAGE,and ther is nothing like aiming or reloading can distrub you from shooting.
detailed_description:
Tired of "Pew-Pew" Pistol, Why not try about 40mm Bofors Anti-air Guns, or Mighty 88mm Flak-cannon?
　　Without Aiming and Reloading, There is Only Trigger happy.
　　Welcome to Barrage, 23mm"Shilka"Cannon is the Tiniest Weapon in this game.
　　
　　About This Game:
　　-This is a Simple Shooooooooooooooooting Game.
　　-"Aiming"is not Included in this game.Just be Rambo.
　　-Swiftly Attack/Defence Stance Switch.

　　Four Weapon Unlocked:
　　-ZSU-23-4"Shilka"Autocannon
　　-40mm"Bofors"Cannon
　　-88mm Flak36 Cannon
　　-M48"Chaparral"Missile

　　Face the Combination Attack of:
　　-V-1 Ballistic Missile
　　-V-1 Ballistic Missile
　　-Ju-87 Dive Bomber
　　-Do-17 Medium Bomber
　　-Fritz-X Guided Bomb
　　-Me-264 Heavy Bomber
　　-Ho-229 Jet Fighter.
　　-War Zepplin
　　-Flying Fortress
　　-Armed UFO
　　-Unidentified WunderWaffen

　　Don't make a fuss about shooting WWII Aircraft with Cold War weapons, They are probably used to it.
